---
name: Security Suggestion
about: Suggest a new security checklist item or improvement
title: '[SECURITY] '
labels: security, enhancement
assignees: ''

---

**Security Category**
Which category does this belong to? (Authentication, Authorization, Input Validation, etc.)

**Describe the security concern**
A clear and concise description of the security issue or best practice.

**Proposed checklist item**
What should be added to the checklist?

**References**
- Link to OWASP documentation
- Link to CVE or security advisory
- Link to relevant articles or papers

**Priority Level**
What priority level should this have? (Critical, High, Medium, Low)

**Additional context**
Add any other context, code examples, or screenshots about the security suggestion here.
